title: More Immersive Aircraft
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e897b55fb7e730ad438dbef6ede92a61abfdd68.png)

``` This texture pack provides new textures for Immersive Aircraft, which are vanilla friendly and more realistic. ```


![imagery1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p78Azi6r/images/961b1ce09c21c691055a48e2a81ebf296bf50a3b.png) [ ![imagery2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed580bff123afd06cae4305ec64ff3a671733bd0.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-immersive-aircraft/gallery)


Link to the base mod:\ [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
